ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the player (e.g., 11th, 12th grade) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the player */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the player */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the player */,
  "guardian_info" TEXT /* Information about the player's guardian */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport the team participates in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color of the team */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach manages */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been coaching */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Coaching certifications the coach has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "GP" INTEGER /* Games played by the player in this game */,
  "TUH" INTEGER /* Total usage hours by the player */,
  "P" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "TU" INTEGER /* Total usage by the player */,
  "I" INTEGER /* Interceptions by the player */,
  "P%" REAL /* Shooting percentage of the player */,
  "PP20TUH" REAL /* Points per 20 usage hours of the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the player, e.g., out of 5 */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach or administrator who wrote the review */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the review was written for */,
  "performance_areas" TEXT /* Areas of performance (e.g., offense, defense, teamwork) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the standings are for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the tournament organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the tournament's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to the tournament's social media profiles */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* Information about sponsors of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team participating */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the tournament */,
  "current_round" TEXT /* Current round the team is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., game schedule, performance review, achievement) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee assigned to the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, postponed, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Expected attendance for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedule_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
